missing_coverage: No test case for email format validation (e.g., missing @, invalid domain)
No test case for password with all valid characters but edge case (e.g., exactly 8 chars with special char at start/end)
No test case for concurrent account creation with same email (race condition)
No test case for email verification link expiration boundary (e.g., exactly at expiration time)
No test case for password with only lowercase or only uppercase alphabets (complexity edge case)
No test case for email with special characters (e.g., +, dots, quotes) as per RFC standards
No test case for account creation with empty fields
No test case for account creation with whitespace-only fields
No test case for password with Unicode characters
No test case for email case sensitivity (e.g., User@Example.com vs user@example.com)
duplicate_testcases: TC005 and TC016 are functionally identical (duplicate email rejection) - TC016 is redundant as it only adds UI validation check
TC006 and TC017 are functionally identical (password too short) - TC017 is redundant
TC007 and TC018 are functionally identical (password too long) - TC018 is redundant
TC008 and TC019 are functionally identical (missing number) - TC019 is redundant
TC009 and TC020 are functionally identical (missing special char) - TC020 is redundant
TC010 and TC021 are functionally identical (missing alphabet) - TC021 is redundant
TC011 and TC022 are functionally identical (email too long) - TC022 is redundant
weak_or_vague_testcases: TC004: Test data description 'a...@b.c (255 characters total)' is vague and not reproducible without exact string
TC011: Test data '256 character email string' is vague and not reproducible
TC022: Test data '256 character email string' is vague and not reproducible
TC024: Test data 'token': 'expired_token_value' is vague - needs actual expired token generation mechanism
TC025: Missing specific steps for how to navigate to resend functionality
recommendations: Remove duplicate UI validation test cases (TC016-TC022) as they are already covered by negative test cases (TC005-TC011)
Add test cases for email format validation (invalid formats like missing @, invalid domain)
Add test cases for empty and whitespace-only fields
Add test cases for password complexity edge cases (e.g., all lowercase, all uppercase, Unicode)
Add test case for email case sensitivity handling
Add test case for concurrent duplicate email registration (race condition)
Add test case for email verification token expiration boundary (exactly at expiration time)
Make test data in TC004, TC011, TC022 more specific and reproducible (e.g., provide exact string generation method)
Clarify TC024 test data with actual mechanism to obtain expired token
Add more detailed steps to TC025 for resend verification flow
Consider adding performance test for account creation under load
Add accessibility test cases for error messages (screen reader compatibility)
